ogTitle: Kingston On Murray vs Kingston Se: Climate Safety

heading: Kingston On Murray vs Kingston Se — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kingston On Murray, South Australia and Kingston Se, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kingston Se has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Kingston On Murray (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kingston On Murray or Kingston Se safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kingston On Murray has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Kingston Se scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kingston On Murray scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Kingston Se scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kingston On Murray or Kingston Se?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kingston Se has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
